LanguageData.Spaceports_FuelDispenser.description: A terminal used to purchase fusion fuel for small shuttlecraft. Must be placed adjacent to a landing pad to work; once payment has been verified, pumps inside the pad will draw fuel from fuel tanks on the same powernet.
LanguageData.Spaceports_FuelDispenser.label: fusion fuel terminal
LanguageData.Spaceports_FuelProcessor.description: A spacer-tech fuel processor. Must be placed in shallow water to operate; once activated, volatiles from supplied chemfuel are combined with siphoned water in its massive reaction tank and energized, setting off a complex chain of chemical reactions that ultimately resolve into a common variety of liquid fusion fuel.
LanguageData.Spaceports_FuelProcessor.label: fusion fuel processor
LanguageData.Spaceports_FuelTank.description: A spacer-tech tank designed to hold liquid fusion fuel. Its integrated cooling systems must run at all times, or the fuel inside will begin to evaporate away.
LanguageData.Spaceports_FuelTank.label: fusion fuel tank
